programs.title: On The Red Dot
programs.desc: We celebrate Singaporeans making a quiet impact despite challenges. Kelvin Pung, a disabled diver, captures marine life while Azman Hamid, one of Pulau Ubin's last taxi drivers, preserves kampung life.

programs.title: East Asia Tonight
programs.desc: (Live) Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programs.title: ROOTS: A Greening Journey
programs.desc: Singapore horticulturists search for new climate proof trees in Latin America, where years ago, the city-state's greening pioneers sourced plants that helped transform the island into a Garden City.

programs.title: Asia Tonight
programs.desc: (Live) News and views from around the region, delivered with uniquely Asian perspectives.

programs.title: CNA Correspondent
programs.desc: They're your eyes and ears around the globe. CNA's network of correspondents shines a light on stories from their corners of the world, from groundbreaking events to up-and-coming trends.

programs.title: Singapore Tonight
programs.desc: (Live) From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.
